label: Transparent Hornbill casque motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural transparent motif chroma-key source
Asset type: Morphous Hornbill transparent motif
Primary request: Create only an isolated hornbill casque motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a bold hornbill head-and-casque cutout focused on the oversized yellow casque and ivory-black bill, black-and-white feather markings, small watchful eye, tropical canopy green reflected edge tones, sculptural aerodynamic silhouette, crisp high-contrast markings, premium natural-history illustration with realistic texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; the casque is the dominant shape, angled three-quarter profile; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves the yellow casque, black feathers, white throat highlights, and subtle green canopy reflections.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full body, no branch, no forest background, no extra birds, no text, no watermark, no logo, no random marks.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Hornbill" / "Hornbill Casque", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Use a bold navigation system derived from a tropical-canopy hornbill casque: saturated golden yellow casque primary, deep feather black, ivory white bill and throat, canopy green supporting accents, warm horn neutrals, leaf-shadow borders, and high-contrast graphic striping.

Board structure: large readable title area, motif story, palette swatches with names and hex values, typography guidance for English and Japanese, bold left navigation rail, top app bar, dashboard charts, data table, form controls, search/command, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture samples, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples.

Visual language: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, confident navigation hierarchy, 8px radius cards, strong black dividers, casque-yellow primary actions, ivory surfaces, canopy-green active states, dark feather text, horn-cream panels, crisp white/black contrast, subtle casque texture bands, tropical canopy context without literal scenery.

Palette to show consistently: Casque Yellow #f6bf26, Bill Ivory #fff3cf, Feather Black #12130f, Canopy Green #2f6b43, Leaf Shadow #6f7b47, Horn Amber #d88918, Soft Plume #f8f5ea, Liana Taupe #b7a779, Understory Ink #273026.

Avoid fake brand names, watermark, lorem ipsum blocks, tiny illegible token tables, purple/blue gradients, neon, unrelated saturated colors, random logos, decorative blobs, and stock UI kit styling.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Hornbill" / "Hornbill Casque", translated from the light board and the same tropical-canopy hornbill casque motif. Use a bold navigation system with deep feather-black and understory-ink backgrounds, casque-yellow primary actions, ivory foreground text, canopy-green active states, leaf-shadow borders, horn-amber charts, warm bill-ivory highlights, and subtle moonlit casque texture.

Board structure: large readable title area, Dark Mode label, motif story, palette swatches with names and hex values, typography guidance for English and Japanese, bold left navigation rail, top app bar, dashboard charts, data table, form controls, search/command, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture samples, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples.

Visual language: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, confident high-contrast navigation hierarchy, 8px radius cards, crisp black/ivory dividers, yellow casque call-to-action buttons, canopy-green focus rings, dark feather surfaces, warm horn neutral cards, legible tables and form controls, tropical canopy context through texture and color rather than literal scenery.

Palette to show consistently: Feather Black #12130f, Understory Ink #273026, Night Canopy #17251b, Casque Yellow #f6bf26, Horn Amber #d88918, Bill Ivory #fff3cf, Soft Plume #f8f5ea, Canopy Green #2f6b43, Leaf Shadow #6f7b47, Liana Taupe #b7a779.

Avoid neon, unrelated saturated colors, purple/blue gradients, flat pure black everywhere, fake brand names, watermark, random logos, decorative blobs, tiny illegible token tables, and stock UI kit styling.
